case_title: AMANDA ARROSPIDE VS. EDWARD H. SOSS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-17-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF AMANDA ARROSPIDE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DR. EDWARD H. SOSS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARROSPIDE, AMANDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SOSS, EDWARD H. THE COURT SPOKE TO EMANUAL FROM LAKESIDE OPTICAL. HE PERFORMED THE WORK WITH THE PRESCRIPTION PRESENTED TO HIM FROM DR. SOSS. AT THIS TIME, THE CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE WITH OUT EVIDENCE THE GLASSES ARE NOT THE PRESCRIPTION PRODUCED TO DR. SOSS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY ARROSPIDE, AMANDA AS TO DEFENDANT SOSS, EDWARD H. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED SEP-28-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOSS, EDWARD H.
